Returns an array of Campaign objects that have been sent to or are scheduled for this mailing list. Useful for viewing campaign history and performance for a specific audience segment.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description was empty, missing information about parameter requirements, return type, scope (campaigns for specific mailing list), and practical use case. Added these details to help AI agents understand the relationship between mailing lists and campaigns.
